Localization.Description: Detection of attempts to remove an account from a group that is significant for IS (table list Significant_Windows_Groups)

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name} removed the account {object.account.name} from the group "{object.name}" that is significant for IS on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} removed the account from the group "{object.name}" that is significant for IS on host {event_src.host}. Added user details: {object.account.id}.
